_meta.description: LLM-synthesizes competitor clusters from intake URLs + market intelligence. Operating mode determined by number of competitor_urls. Evidence boundary strictly enforced: no crawling, no external APIs.

url_seeded.description: LLM groups user-provided URLs into 2-4 clusters. Only user-provided URLs may appear in competitor_examples. No invented URLs allowed.

hybrid.description: 1 URL-seeded cluster for the provided URL + 1-2 archetype clusters for remaining landscape. Archetype clusters use ARCHETYPE-PLACEHOLDER.

archetype.description: 2-3 pure archetype clusters based on competitor_types from market_intelligence. All competitor_examples use ARCHETYPE-PLACEHOLDER.

archetype_placeholder_rule.usage: Used as the url field in competitor_examples for all archetype-mode clusters. Signals to downstream phases and human reviewers that no real URL was provided and the example is a hypothetical archetype.
archetype_placeholder_rule.enforcement: The Parse/Validate node strips invented URLs from url-seeded clusters and replaces them with ARCHETYPE-PLACEHOLDER for archetype clusters. This is enforced in code, not just in prompt.

competitor_clusters.description: Array of cluster objects. Written to {project_root}/{project_id}/competitor-clusters.json (self-hosted) or returned inline (cloud).

envelope.description: Runtime envelope added alongside existing output keys

new_optional_outputs.description: Per-cluster classification: direct | indirect | substitute | aspirational | mixed
Per-cluster price tier: budget | mass-market | mass-premium | premium | luxury | mixed | unknown
Brief description of this cluster's visual/brand style
Per-cluster product range breadth: single-product | narrow | moderate | broad | marketplace-scale
Types of trust signals this cluster relies on
1-2 sentence summary of what this cluster means for the store

evidence_boundary.description: Strictly enforced. No external data, no crawling, no competitive intelligence APIs.
rules: competitor_urls are used as naming/labeling hints ONLY — not fetched, crawled, or researched
All cluster content (strengths, weaknesses, patterns, opportunities) is LLM inference
All competitor_examples outside user-provided URLs must use ARCHETYPE-PLACEHOLDER
No invented traffic figures, conversion rates, revenue, or competitive metrics
All outputs are planning hypotheses requiring human verification

validation_errors.description: store_profile or market_intelligence or normalized_intake_payload absent from pipeline
LLM response could not be parsed as valid JSON
LLM response was valid JSON but not an array, and could not be unwrapped to an array
One or more clusters fail inline validation (required fields, enum values, minItems). Always runs in both cloud and self-hosted modes.

skipped: AJV schema validation (replaced by inline enum/structure checks)
cloud_behavior.inline_output: competitor_clusters (array) returned in pipeline. artifact_path is null.
cloud_behavior.inline_validation: Inline enum and required-field validation always runs in both modes as Step 3 of Parse node.
